PebblePath
Your family's AI companion — always one step ahead.

A calmer way to run a busy family.

Family life runs on a thousand small decisions — schedules, school emails, packing lists, pickups. PebblePath is the AI that carries the load — quietly noticing what matters and preparing the next step before you have to ask.
What you get
Meet Pebble, your AI companion
Pebble learns your family's routines and rhythms, then turns them into a calm daily brief — proactive reminders, prep lists and ready-to-use plans.
A coordinator that never forgets
Allergies, sizes, routines, daycare details, preferences — PebblePath remembers the small things so no one has to, and both parents stay in sync.
The operational load, lifted
Packing lists, pediatrician summaries, calendar coordination, parent handoffs — the invisible work behind family life, quietly handled for you.
See it in action
Pebble + your family dashboard
iOS & web · Always private · Grows with your family
